title: Domain 2: Design Resilient Architectures (26%)
description: Build for failure: high availability across Availability Zones, loosely coupled components, and disaster recovery with clear RTO/RPO trade-offs.

lessons.title: High Availability and Fault Tolerance
objectives: Combine ELB and Auto Scaling into a self-healing tier
Use Route 53 failover and RDS Multi-AZ for availability

lessons.title: Decoupling with Queues and Events
objectives: Choose between SQS, SNS, and EventBridge
Apply the SNS + SQS fan-out pattern

lessons.title: Backup and Disaster Recovery
objectives: Define RTO and RPO and how they drive DR decisions
Compare the four DR strategies by cost and recovery speed
Pick services for backup and cross-Region recovery
